headline: Camp Dream GA has been serving campers and families since 1996
subheadline: What began as a response to a need for a traditional camp environment for children and young adults with disabilities has grown into a lasting ministry shaped by volunteers, families, and supporters.
sectionsHeadline: What the history says about the mission

sections.title: Longevity matters
sections.description: A camp that has continued for decades communicates trust, consistency, and deep community roots.

sections.title: The heart of camp has stayed the same
sections.description: Even as the public experience evolves, the center remains a camp environment where campers can belong and participate.

sections.title: The future still depends on people
sections.description: The same volunteer energy and donor support that helped camp begin are still what keep the mission strong now.

cta.heading: History makes more sense when you can also see the programs, volunteer pathways, and supporter roles that carry the mission forward now.
cta.body: The strongest public experience ties the story of camp directly to the current ways people can participate.
